case_title: BLANDING, JAMES F. vs. HERRING, JAMES et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT HERRING, JAMES ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERRING, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1762 QUESADA AVENUE, ROOM 3, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL AUG-21-2001, LEASE FORFEITED
